_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: Priorita je ASSESSED ordinál (materialita + řešitelnost + slabost důvěry), ne stupeň grafu.

tasks.target: one label s.r.o. (IČO 02474727, Znojmo) — jednatel roles, stakes and dates for its three co-owners
tasks.question: Vyřešit rozpor CON-02: one label s.r.o. (IČO 02474727, Znojmo) — jednatel roles, stakes and dates for its three co-owners
tasks.reason: Two independent research passes over the same aggregator mirror returned inconsistent role/date/stake attributions across the three named co-owners of one label s.r.o. Neither pass reached a raw or.justice.cz page directly — its search UI is JS-rendered and blocked automated fetch both times — so this cannot yet be resolved to VERIFIED_PRIMARY. All three names (Juhaňák, Jakub Kaman, Ondřej Kaman) are confirmed to hold SOME stake/role in the company; only the precise split and dates are in dispute. Recorded as a live contradiction rather than silently picking one version. A manual or.justice.cz lookup for IČO 02474727 would resolve this.
tasks.recommendedSource: or.justice.cz — přímý výpis IČO 02474727 (one label s.r.o.)

tasks.question: Filed financial statements (revenue, result, assets, headcount) — available at justice.cz Sbírka listin, not retrieved in this pass.
tasks.reason: Otevřená mezera v evidenci (open_question) v dimenzi financials.

tasks.question: All facts sourced to SRC-10/SRC-11 (kurzy.cz, Hlídač státu) are CORROBORATED via aggregator mirrors, not VERIFIED_PRIMARY via a direct or.justice.cz fetch — the firm/person *search* UI is JS-rendered and blocked automated fetch, though the Sbírka listin document index and downloads (SRC-15/16/17) did work directly and reach VERIFIED_PRIMARY.
tasks.reason: Otevřená mezera v evidenci (open_question) v dimenzi ownership.
tasks.recommendedSource: přímý or.justice.cz fetch (nahradit aggregator mirrors SRC-10/11)

tasks.question: Vyřešit rozpor CON-01: Court file number (spisová značka)
tasks.reason: The public register value (C 85425) is the authoritative one. The value on the company's own legal page (C 85424) is most plausibly a transcription error or a stale copy. This is recorded, not silently normalized.
